hero.subtitle: Built to last. Created for you.

parallax.title: A website, a breath
parallax.description: Your online universe, smooth and natural. Every element is crafted for you.
parallax.default: Green Dev creates high-performance, sustainable, tailor-made web solutions. Our approach combines technical efficiency, eco-design, and digital strategy.

services.title: Custom Web Services – GreenDev
services.subtitle: Development, platforms, eco-design, mobile & SEO
services.intro: GreenDev supports you in building robust, sustainable, and high-performing digital solutions: websites, connected platforms, mobile tools, client spaces, or SEO strategy. Each service is designed to meet your business challenges and improve your online visibility.

list.title: Custom Website
list.description: We create websites that reflect your image: fast, accessible, responsive, and SEO-optimized. Each project is designed to showcase your business, your services, and ease user navigation.

list.title: Platform & API
list.description: Need to connect tools or structure complex workflows? We develop custom web platforms and APIs to automate internal processes and ensure consistent data.

list.title: Mobile Administration
list.description: Manage your activity on the go: posts, bookings, updates... Our admin interface is optimized for mobile use with essential features at your fingertips.

list.title: Data Management Dashboard
list.description: We set up interactive dashboards to visualize, filter, and analyze your data in real time. These tools are customized to your KPIs for informed decisions.

list.title: Client Space & Booking
list.description: Offer your users a personal space to book, pay online, manage their info, and receive notifications. A modern, secure interface to strengthen customer relations.

list.title: Technical Audit & Eco-Design
list.description: We analyze your existing site to identify technical, accessibility, and environmental performance issues. You'll receive a clear action plan.

list.title: Maintenance & Continuous Improvement
list.description: We handle stability, backups, updates, and new features for your solution. Ideal for long-term peace of mind.

list.title: Content Strategy & SEO
list.description: We structure your content and help you optimize it to boost your visibility and impact with your audience.

why.title: Why choose Green Dev?
why.titleSeo: Why choose GreenDev? – Ethical & high-performing services
why.metaDescription: GreenDev designs responsible digital services: efficiency, performance, accessibility, and tailored support.
why.seoText: Green Dev designs sustainable, high-performance, and ethical interfaces. Our sites are built for a cleaner, faster, and more meaningful web.

points.title: ♻️ Digital Sobriety
points.description: Fast, lightweight apps and sites designed to reduce energy use.

points.title: ☁️ Green Hosting
points.description: Eco-friendly infrastructure powered by renewable energy.

points.title: 🔗 Custom APIs
points.description: Interfaces to connect your tools and automate data flows.

points.title: 📊 Interactive Dashboards
points.description: Clear interfaces to monitor your data in real time.

points.title: 🔍 Enhanced Visibility
points.description: SEO baked in from day one to increase your reach.

points.title: ⏱️ Continuous Support
points.description: Ongoing maintenance and updates for long-term performance.

contact.title: Contact me
contact.subtitle: A project, a question, an idea to share? Send me a message and I’ll get back to you quickly 🌿
